zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mallory於從1392年1月9日到1393年1月8日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾沙波利時，她的父親William Mallory18歲，母親Lady Jane Plumpton12歲。她於從1386年1月9日到1387年1月8日與Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年2月4日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mallory was born from 9 January 1392 to 8 January 1393, in Shawbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Mallory, was 18 and her mother, Lady Jane Plumpton, was 12. She married Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET from 9 January 1386 to 8 January 1387. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 4 February 1439, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mallory est née du 9 janvier 1392 au 8 janvier 1393, à Shawbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mallory, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Plumpton, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET du 9 janvier 1386 au 8 janvier 1387. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 février 1439, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Malloryがから1392年1月9日まで1393年1月8日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシャウブリーで生まれた時，父William Malloryは18歳，母Lady Jane Plumptonは12歳であった。から1386年1月9日まで1387年1月8日にSir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBETと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年2月4日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mallory(이)가 1392년 1월 9일부터 1393년 1월 8일까지 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쇼버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mallory(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Plumpton(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1386년 1월 9일부터 1387년 1월 8일까지 Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mallory родилась с 9 января 1392 по 8 января 1393 в местности шавбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Mallory было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Plumpton, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET с 9 января 1386 по 8 января 1387. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 февраля 1439 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
